fallback_next_change.scope: Low-risk validator-only slice for required/optional/forbidden slot keys after the copy verifier if copy ambiguity blocks implementation.
fallback_next_change.why_fallback: Key-boundary errors are not the largest residual, but a validator can be implemented without changing model targets or strict historical evaluator semantics.

fields.description: V1-compatible slot value or bounded structured value authored by the model.
fields.name: value

fields.description: Coarse type derived from the value: text, number, boolean, object, list, null, or unknown.
fields.name: value_type

fields.description: Primary representation strategy selected from evidence and task scope.
fields.name: representation_kind

fields.description: Optional verifier-owned source slice containing start, end, text, and source_text_hash.
fields.name: source_span

fields.description: Optional allowlisted deterministic normalization rule applied after source back-slice validation.
fields.name: normalization_rule

fields.description: Verifier result: verified, unsupported, or unresolved.
fields.name: verification_status

fields.description: Verifier provenance: source_verified, deterministic_derived, schema_constrained, structured_generated, free_generated, or unknown.
fields.name: provenance

fields.description: Fail-closed outcome: emit_v1_value, fail_closed, clarify, diagnostic_only, or resolver_required.
fields.name: fallback_behavior

model_target_recommendation.answer: 模型不需要直接输出 offsets；V1 推荐模型输出 value，由系统验证并附加 source span。

comparison.chinese_asr_stability: highest; value text survives minor transcript formatting changes better than offsets
comparison.current_7b_fit: best fit because current model already emits V1 slot values
comparison.duplicate_text_risk: system must fail closed or request disambiguation when multiple identical spans exist
comparison.learning_difficulty: lowest for current V1-style generative target
comparison.name: model_outputs_value_system_verifies_span
comparison.verifiability: high when deterministic verifier can attach a unique span; ambiguous duplicates remain unresolved

comparison.chinese_asr_stability: medium; snippets can drift with ASR punctuation or spacing
comparison.current_7b_fit: usable only as a narrowed fallback
comparison.duplicate_text_risk: higher than value-only unless candidate context is added
comparison.name: model_outputs_candidate_source_snippet_system_resolves_offset
comparison.v1_compatibility: requires additional internal candidate pointer metadata
comparison.verifiability: medium; snippet remains untrusted until exact offset validation succeeds

comparison.chinese_asr_stability: lowest; offsets are brittle under transcript edits
comparison.current_7b_fit: poor without a new target and focused training
comparison.duplicate_text_risk: low if offsets are correct, but correctness is hard to learn
comparison.name: model_outputs_start_end_offsets
comparison.verifiability: high after output, but invalid offsets are common failure modes

acceptance_criteria: No training, data mutation, evaluator relaxation, or V1 schema migration.
Source spans use half-open Unicode offsets and exact back-slice validation.
Provenance and verification_status are system-derived only.
Unsupported or ambiguous spans fail closed or become unresolved.
recommended_next_change.scope: Implement only the verifier-owned copy-backed span/provenance slice for high-copyability slot paths while keeping BrowserTaskContract V1 external serialization unchanged.
why_first: These paths have high observed copyability and concrete partial/copy residuals.
The slice can be evaluated offline on current prediction artifacts without training.
It adds fail-closed verifier-owned metadata without changing the external V1 schema.

why_not_full_hybrid_system_now: The design mixes copy verification, key validation, URL resolver policy, and bounded generation; implementing all at once would change multiple contracts at once.
URL and ambiguity/reason substructures still need narrower verifier and resolver evidence.
A copy-backed slice gives the clearest offline fail-closed evaluation without training or external schema migration.
